# gleam: The GLEAM R Package

**The official R package of the FAO’s Global Livestock Environmental
Assessment Model (GLEAM).**

This package provides a modular implementation of GLEAM to quantify
environmental impacts from livestock agrifood systems. The model
simulates herd dynamics and quantifies key metrics, including
animal-sourced food production, energy requirements and feed intake,
nitrogen balance, and greenhouse gas emissions from enteric
fermentation, manure management, and upstream feed production. The
package also allocates estimated emissions to major animal products and
services.

## Purpose

This package supports the sustainable transformation of livestock
systems by enabling evidence-based decision-making through a transparent
and reproducible modeling framework.

The **official GLEAM workflow** allows users to:

- Simulate steady-state herd dynamics to disaggregate animal herds into
  age and sex-specific cohorts
- Compute annual production of animal products and herd growth rate
- Estimate animal energy requirements for maintenance, activity, growth,
  lactation, pregnancy, work, eggs, and fiber production
- Compute nutritional contributions of user-defined feed rations per
  cohort
- Estimate dry matter intake and nitrogen balance
- Estimate methane (CH₄) emissions from enteric fermentation
- Estimate CH₄ and nitrous oxide (N₂O) emissions from manure management
- Estimate carbon dioxide (CO₂), CH₄, and N₂O emission related to the
  production, processing and transport of feed
- Allocate estimated emissions to major animal products and services

## Model Coverage

The model currently considers cattle, buffalo, camels, goats, pigs, and
sheep.

## Installation

To install the development version of the package:

``` r
# If devtools is not installed
install.packages("devtools")

# Install from GitHub
devtools::install_git("https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM.git")
```

## Help & Contact

We kindly ask users to inform us of your usage, as this helps us track
the tool’s impact and guide future improvements. Please also get in
touch with the GLEAM development team for documentation, internal
guidance, or technical questions.

- 📧 <Info-GLEAM@fao.org>
- 🌐 [GLEAM Website](https://www.fao.org/gleam/en/)

## License

This package is licensed under the AGPL-3 license which permits free
use, modification, and sharing of the software. Under AGPL-3.0, any
modifications to the code must be made publicly available by creating a
new branch on GitHub. The software cannot be relicensed under more
restrictive terms without adhering to the AGPL-3.0 guidelines.
Developers may anonymize or remove any sensitive or identifiable data
(customizations) before resubmitting code.

## Acknowledgement

The development of the GLEAM ecosystem was supported by the German
Federal Ministry of Food, Agriculture, and Regional Identity
[BMELH](https://www.bmleh.de/EN/Home/home_node.html).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Package index

## Main pipeline

- [`run_gleam()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_gleam.md)
  : Run the full Global Livestock Environmental Assessment Model (GLEAM)
  Pipeline

## Demographic herd module

- [`run_demographic_herd_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_demographic_herd_module.md)
  : Run Demographic Herd Module Pipeline
- [`calc_fecundity_rates()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_fecundity_rates.md)
  : Calculate daily fecundity rates
- [`calc_transition_probabilities()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_transition_probabilities.md)
  : Calculate transition probabilities for sex-age classes
- [`calc_steady_state_structure()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_steady_state_structure.md)
  : Calculate steady-state population structure
- [`calc_projected_population_size()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_projected_population_size.md)
  : Calculate one year of steady-state population dynamics
- [`calc_summary_offtake()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_summary_offtake.md)
  : Summarise offtake and stock Variation for a steady-state year

## Weights module

- [`run_weights_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_weights_module.md)
  : Run Weights Module Pipeline
- [`calc_avg_weights()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_avg_weights.md)
  : Calculate average and final live weights by cohort
- [`calc_cohort_weights()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_cohort_weights.md)
  : Calculate live weights by cohort and life stage
- [`calc_daily_weight_gain()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_daily_weight_gain.md)
  : Calculate daily weight gain by cohort

## Ration quality module

- [`run_ration_quality_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_ration_quality_module.md)
  : Run Ration Quality Module Pipeline
- [`calc_feed_digestibility_fraction()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_feed_digestibility_fraction.md)
  : Calculate feed digestibility fraction
- [`calc_ration_digestibility()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ration_digestibility.md)
  : Calculate diet digestibility contribution for a ration component
- [`calc_ration_metabolizable_energy()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ration_metabolizable_energy.md)
  : Calculate diet metabolizable energy contribution for a ration
  component
- [`calc_ration_gross_energy()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ration_gross_energy.md)
  : Calculate diet gross energy contribution for a ration component
- [`calc_ration_nitrogen_content()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ration_nitrogen_content.md)
  : Calculate diet nitrogen contribution for a ration component
- [`calc_ration_urinary_energy_fraction()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ration_urinary_energy_fraction.md)
  : Calculate urinary energy fraction contribution for a ration
  component
- [`calc_ration_ash()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ration_ash.md)
  : Calculate diet ash contribution for a ration component

## Metabolic energy requirements module

- [`run_metabolic_energy_req_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_metabolic_energy_req_module.md)
  : Run Metabolic Energy Requirements and Dry Matter Intake Module
  Pipeline
- [`calc_metabolic_energy_req_maintenance()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_metabolic_energy_req_maintenance.md)
  : Calculate metabolic energy requirements for maintenance
- [`calc_metabolic_energy_req_activity()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_metabolic_energy_req_activity.md)
  : Calculate metabolic energy requirements for activity
- [`calc_metabolic_energy_req_growth()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_metabolic_energy_req_growth.md)
  : Calculate metabolic energy requirements for growth
- [`calc_metabolic_energy_req_lactation()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_metabolic_energy_req_lactation.md)
  : Calculate metabolic energy requirements for lactation
- [`calc_metabolic_energy_req_pregnancy()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_metabolic_energy_req_pregnancy.md)
  : Calculate metabolic energy requirements for pregnancy
- [`calc_metabolic_energy_req_work()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_metabolic_energy_req_work.md)
  : Calculate metabolic energy requirements for work
- [`calc_metabolic_energy_req_fibre()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_metabolic_energy_req_fibre.md)
  : Calculate metabolic energy requirements for fibre production
- [`calc_rem_maintenance()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_rem_maintenance.md)
  : Calculate ratio of net energy available for maintenance in the diet
  (REM - Net Energy for Maintenance / Digestible Energy)
- [`calc_reg_growth()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_reg_growth.md)
  : Calculate the ratio of net energy available for growth in the diet
  (REG – Net Energy for Growth / Digestible Energy)
- [`calc_total_metabolic_energy_req()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_total_metabolic_energy_req.md)
  : Calculate total metabolic energy requirements
- [`calc_ration_intake()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ration_intake.md)
  : Calculate daily ration intake in dry matter

## Nitrogen balance module

- [`run_nitrogen_balance_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_nitrogen_balance_module.md)
  : Run Nitrogen Balance Module Pipeline
- [`calc_nitrogen_intake()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_nitrogen_intake.md)
  : Calculate daily nitrogen intake
- [`calc_nitrogen_retention()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_nitrogen_retention.md)
  : Calculate daily nitrogen retention
- [`calc_nitrogen_excretion()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_nitrogen_excretion.md)
  : Calculate daily nitrogen excretion

## Enteric emissions module

- [`run_emissions_enteric_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_emissions_enteric_module.md)
  : Run Enteric Methane (CH4) Emissions Module Pipeline
- [`calc_conversion_factor_ym()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_conversion_factor_ym.md)
  : Calculate methane conversion factor (ym)
- [`calc_ch4_enteric()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ch4_enteric.md)
  : Calculate daily enteric methane emissions

## Manure emissions module

- [`run_emissions_manure_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_emissions_manure_module.md)
  : Run Emissions from Manure Module Pipeline
- [`calc_volatile_solids()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_volatile_solids.md)
  : Calculate Volatile Solids (VS)
- [`calc_ch4_manure()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ch4_manure.md)
  : Calculate methane (CH4) emissions from manure management systems
- [`calc_n2o_manure_direct()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_n2o_manure_direct.md)
  : Calculate direct Nitrous Oxide (N2O) emissions from manure
  management systems
- [`calc_n2o_manure_volatilization()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_n2o_manure_volatilization.md)
  : Calculate indirect Nitrous Oxide (N2O) emissions from manure
  volatilization
- [`calc_n2o_manure_leaching()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_n2o_manure_leaching.md)
  : Calculate indirect Nitrous Oxide (N2O) emissions from manure
  leaching and runoff
- [`calc_n2o_manure_total()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_n2o_manure_total.md)
  : Calculate total Nitrous Oxide (N2O) emissions from manure

## Feed emissions module

- [`run_emissions_ration_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_emissions_ration_module.md)
  : Run Emissions from Feed Production Module Pipeline
- [`calc_ch4_ration_rice()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_ch4_ration_rice.md)
  : Calculate a ration component's contribution to methane (CH4)
  emissions from rice cultivation
- [`calc_co2_ration_fertilizer()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_co2_ration_fertilizer.md)
  : Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO2)
  emissions from fertilizer manufacture
- [`calc_co2_ration_pesticides()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_co2_ration_pesticides.md)
  : Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO2)
  emissions from pesticide manufacture
- [`calc_co2_ration_crop_activities()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_co2_ration_crop_activities.md)
  : Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO2)
  emissions from on-field agricultural activities
- [`calc_co2_ration_luc_nopeat()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_co2_ration_luc_nopeat.md)
  : Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO2)
  emissions from land-use change (excluding peatland drainage)
- [`calc_co2_ration_luc_peat()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_co2_ration_luc_peat.md)
  : Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO2)
  emissions from peatland drainage
- [`calc_n2o_ration_fertilizer()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_n2o_ration_fertilizer.md)
  : Calculate a ration component's contribution to nitrous oxide (N2O)
  emissions from fertilizer use
- [`calc_n2o_ration_manure()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_n2o_ration_manure.md)
  : Calculate a ration component's contribution to nitrous oxide (N2O)
  emissions from manure application and deposition
- [`calc_n2o_ration_crop_residues()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_n2o_ration_crop_residues.md)
  : Calculate a ration component's contribution to nitrous oxide (N2O)
  emissions from crop residues decomposition

## Production module

- [`run_production_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_production_module.md)
  : Run Production Module Pipeline
- [`calc_milk_production()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_milk_production.md)
  : Calculate milk production
- [`calc_meat_production()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_meat_production.md)
  : Calculate meat production
- [`calc_fibre_production()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_fibre_production.md)
  : Calculate fibre production

## Allocation module

- [`run_allocation_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_allocation_module.md)
  : Run Allocation Module Pipeline
- [`calc_milk_allocation_energy()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_milk_allocation_energy.md)
  : Calculate milk energy requirements (for biophysical allocation)
- [`calc_meat_allocation_energy()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_meat_allocation_energy.md)
  : Calculate meat energy requirements (for biophysical allocation)
- [`calc_fibre_allocation_energy()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_fibre_allocation_energy.md)
  : Calculate fibre energy requirements (for biophysical allocation)
- [`calc_work_allocation_energy()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_work_allocation_energy.md)
  : Calculate work energy requirements (for biophysical allocation)
- [`calc_allocation_shares()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_allocation_shares.md)
  : Calculate allocation shares for livestock commodities
- [`assign_allocation_shares()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/assign_allocation_shares.md)
  : Assign allocation shares to emission variables by commodity

## Aggregation module

- [`run_aggregation_module()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/run_aggregation_module.md)
  : Run Aggregation Module Pipeline
- [`calc_cohort_totals()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_cohort_totals.md)
  : Calculate totals by cohort
- [`calc_cohort_to_herd_aggregation()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_cohort_to_herd_aggregation.md)
  : Aggregate cohort-level to herd-level data
- [`calc_allocated_emissions()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_allocated_emissions.md)
  : Calculate allocated greenhouse gas emissions (GHG)
- [`calc_co2eq()`](https://github.com/un-fao/GLEAM/reference/calc_co2eq.md)
  : Convert methane (CH4) and nitrous oxide (N2O) emissions to
  CO2-equivalents (CO2eq) using Global Warming Potentials (GWP) factors
